tasks.title: Create engine types and deck
tasks.description: Rewrite backend/app/engine/types.py with GamePhase, PlayerAction enums and GameState, ActionResult, HandResult dataclasses. Create backend/app/engine/deck.py with Deck class (52 cards, seeded shuffle, deal method).
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: GamePhase has preflop, flop, river, showdown, complete
AC-2: PlayerAction has fold, check, call, raise, all_in
AC-3: Deck deals unique cards, seed produces deterministic shuffle
GATE: python imports succeed

tasks.title: Create hand evaluator
tasks.description: Create backend/app/engine/evaluator.py with hand evaluation for 5-card poker hands. Must evaluate best 5 of 6 cards (2 hole + 4 community). Support all standard rankings: royal flush through high card. Include compare_hands function.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: evaluate_hand returns (score, rank_name) for best 5 of 6 cards
AC-2: compare_hands returns 1 (p1 wins), -1 (p2 wins), 0 (tie)
AC-3: Correctly ranks: royal_flush > straight_flush > four_of_a_kind > full_house > flush > straight > three_of_a_kind > two_pair > pair > high_card
GATE: Known hand comparisons produce correct results

tasks.title: Implement HoldemHand state machine
tasks.description: Create backend/app/engine/holdem.py with HoldemHand class. State machine: init → post blinds → preflop betting → flop dealing/betting → river dealing/betting → showdown → complete. Methods: get_state(agent_id), apply_action(agent_id, action, amount), is_complete(), get_result(). Includes action validation, phase transitions, and pot management.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Blinds posted automatically on init
AC-2: get_state hides opponent hole cards
AC-3: apply_action validates (check/call/raise/fold/all_in) and returns ActionResult
AC-4: Phase transitions: preflop→flop→river→showdown→complete
AC-5: Fold ends hand immediately, winner gets pot
AC-6: Showdown evaluates hands and awards pot
GATE: Full hand can be played to completion

tasks.title: Delete old engine files and dependencies
tasks.description: Delete configurable_bot.py, presets.py, runner.py, hand_evaluator.py. Remove pypokerengine and treys from requirements.txt. Update engine/__init__.py.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: configurable_bot.py, presets.py, runner.py, hand_evaluator.py deleted
AC-2: pypokerengine and treys removed from requirements.txt
GATE: No import errors from engine package

tasks.title: Engine unit tests
tasks.description: Create backend/tests/test_engine.py with unit tests covering: deck dealing, hand evaluation (known hands), action validation, full hand playthrough, fold scenario, showdown, tie splitting, get_state hides cards.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Tests for deck: unique cards, deterministic with seed
AC-2: Tests for evaluator: known hand rankings
AC-3: Tests for HoldemHand: full hand, fold, showdown, validation errors
GATE: pytest test_engine.py passes
